name: github-project-steward
description: Create reusable GitHub Projects, capture ideas as issues, and deliver issue queues through an independent developer-reviewer loop.

interface.shortDescription: Project boards and issue delivery for GitHub
interface.longDescription: Give Codex a reusable GitHub Projects template, Markdown board dashboards, idea-to-issue capture, and a sequential developer-reviewer delivery protocol.
defaultPrompt: Create a GitHub Project for this repository from the reusable public template.
Show every GitHub Project as its own Markdown table.
Plan the open issues and run the developer-reviewer delivery loop.
